$comment: scripts/LancesRoom.asm coords 3 and 4 — the two cells just inside the hall: the doorway slams behind you (EVENT_LANCES_ROOM_LOCK_DOOR latches, the blocks close), so the challenge cannot be abandoned mid-way. IndigoPlateauLobby's reset is what undoes the lock, which is what makes a whiteout recoverable. Non-consuming, and dead once LANCE is beaten (the default script rets early).
